top3.sql:
SELECT 
    strftime('%Y', week_date) AS year,
    segment AS category,
    ROUND(AVG(sales / NULLIF(transactions, 0)), 2) AS avg_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(MAX(sales / NULLIF(transactions, 0)), 2) AS max_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(MIN(sales / NULLIF(transactions, 0)), 2) AS min_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(MAX(sales / NULLIF(transactions, 0)) - MIN(sales / NULLIF(transactions, 0)), 2) AS wholesale_price_difference,
    ROUND(SUM(sales), 2) AS total_wholesale_price,
    ROUND(SUM(sales), 2) AS tot...
